location: Seattle, Washington — Carl & Beatrice's second-floor apartment

body.name: Leather Jacket
body.description: Carl's heavy civilian leather jacket, grabbed on his way out the door to fetch the cat. Its forearm later carries the branded Goblin Pass.

underwear.name: Boxer Shorts
underwear.description: The boxer shorts Carl was sleeping in when the world ended — his only real clothing for the entire dungeon. He never does find pants.

feet.name: Pink Crocs
feet.description: Beatrice's pink Crocs sandals, a size too small; Carl jammed his bare feet into them to run outside after Donut.

inventory.name: Marlboro Reds (half pack)
inventory.description: Half a pack of cigarettes in Carl's jacket pocket. He rations them once he realizes there may never be any more.

inventory.name: Zippo Lighter
inventory.description: Carl's personal Zippo lighter, carried in his jacket.

contacts.name: Princess Donut
contacts.note: Beatrice's pedigreed tortoiseshell Persian show cat, 'Princess Donut the Queen Anne Chonk'. Carl is looking after her following his breakup with Beatrice.
